name: html-to-image

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of a hand-written implementation when you need to export an already rendered DOM node with computed styles, pseudo-elements, images, and fonts to PNG/JPEG/SVG/Blob in the browser, because native implementations fail at deep style cloning, resource inlining, and foreignObject->canvas rasterization.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot produce reliable DOM screenshots by default: it cannot recursively copy computed styles, embed webfonts/background images, reconstruct pseudo-elements, and handle high-DPI canvas. This primitive supplies the last mile for taking non-persistent page output away.

data_in.note: node must be a connected HTMLElement whose layout has completed; the library reads its computed pixel geometry and clones it. Cross-origin images/fonts must be CORS-readable, and a tainted canvas or oversized data URI will fail.

schema.node: HTMLElement -- rendered root node to export, not a selector string or HTML source

options?._default: when omitted, outputs with the node's computed size, a transparent background, and the device pixel ratio
options?.width?: number -- pixel width applied to the cloned node, default computed node width
options?.height?: number -- pixel height applied to the cloned node, default computed node height
options?.canvasWidth?: number -- raster-output pixel width, default width/node width
options?.canvasHeight?: number -- raster-output pixel height, default height/node height
options?.backgroundColor?: CSS color string -- transparent by default
options?.imagePlaceholder?: data URL string -- default empty string

spec.note: The default 400px height applies only to the consumer-side container that displays the export result; vh or percentage height is prohibited. html-to-image itself reads node's computed pixel height by default. Unless options.height/canvasHeight is explicitly supplied, do not use this spec to crop the source node.

when_to_use: 需要在浏览器把一个已渲染 DOM 节点带计算样式、伪元素、图片与字体导出为 PNG/JPEG/SVG/Blob 时用它而非手写,因为原生在深克隆样式、资源内联和 foreignObject→canvas 栅格化上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认完全做不到可靠 DOM 截图:无法递归复制 computed style、嵌入 webfont/背景图、重建伪元素并处理高 DPI canvas;该 primitive 补齐非持久化页面带走成果的最后一公里。

data_in.note: node 必须是已连接并完成布局的 HTMLElement;库读取其计算像素几何并克隆。跨域图片/字体需 CORS 可读,被污染 canvas 或超大 data URI 会失败。

schema.node: HTMLElement —— 要导出的已渲染根节点,不是 selector 字符串或 HTML 源码

options?._default: 未提供时按节点计算尺寸、透明背景、设备像素比输出
options?.width?: number —— 克隆节点应用的像素宽,默认节点计算宽
options?.height?: number —— 克隆节点应用的像素高,默认节点计算高
options?.canvasWidth?: number —— 栅格输出像素宽,默认同 width/节点宽
options?.canvasHeight?: number —— 栅格输出像素高,默认同 height/节点高
options?.backgroundColor?: CSS color string —— 默认透明
options?.imagePlaceholder?: data URL string —— 默认空字符串

spec.note: 仅作为消费端展示导出结果的默认容器高度 400px,禁止 vh 或百分比高;html-to-image 本身默认读取 node 的计算像素高,除非明确传 options.height/canvasHeight,不要用本 spec 裁剪源节点。

provides._note: headless-primitive:不直接渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers;调用者选择一个原生导出函数。

peer.note: 它消费任意已经完成渲染的 component DOM;下载链接、文件命名或回传动作由消费 AI 自己写,本条不规定统一事件出口。

boot.note: 默认示范 PNG;若要 SVG/JPEG/Blob/Canvas/PixelData,从同一 +esm 入口改导入对应具名函数。跨域资源无 CORS 时应先改成 data URL 或同源资源。

isolation.evidence: es/index.js grep 无 document.body / document.head / appendChild / documentElement。工作方式为克隆传入节点→内联样式→序列化为 SVG data URI→Image 绘入离屏 canvas,全程操作脱离文档的克隆与 data URL,不向 body/head 追加、不挂全局监听。可捕获 shadow 内节点(遍历子树)。
